descriptions.english: Upgrade a spell to cost <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> and gain [consume].
descriptions.french: Améliore un sort qui coûte <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> et gagne [consume].
descriptions.german: Verbessere einen Zauber, damit er <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> kostet, und erhalte [consume].
descriptions.russian: Снижает цену чар на <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> и дает [consume].
descriptions.portuguese: Melhora um feitiço para custar <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> e recebe [consume].
descriptions.chinese: 升级一个法术，使其费用 <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> 并获得 [consume]。
descriptions.spanish: Mejora un hechizo para que cueste <nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr> y añade [consume].
descriptions.chinese_traditional: 升級一個法術，使其費用<nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr>，並獲得[consume]。
descriptions.japanese: 呪文アップグレード：<nobr>-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]</nobr>、[consume]を得る。
